checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds a deterministic specbridge-repository-health-summary command that aggregates branch inventory, branch cleanup policy, artifact inventory, and artifact retention policy evidence without authorizing cleanup or enforcement.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command emits overall_health_posture, branch_posture, artifact_posture, policy_posture, cleanup_permission=none, enforcement_status=none, blocked_action_counts, required_future_gates, evidence_sources, non_enforcement_note, and read_only_note. It is read-only when -OutputPath is omitted, writes only .specbridge/repository-health/current.summary.json, and requires -Force to replace an existing artifact.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are inside issue-221 exclusive_write scope. The implementation does not touch workflows, env files, secrets, dependencies, production, billing, authentication, authorization, database, CI/CD security, operator decisions, issue #194, digital twin work, or any branch/artifact mutation behavior.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command writes only the governed repository health summary artifact when explicitly requested, reads local evidence builders only, performs no network calls, and performs no branch or artifact mutation.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: The changed source, docs, dashboard, state, inventory, MCP catalog, contract, scope, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT audit files are all declared in issue-221 scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The CLI regression suite includes repository health summary coverage for command shape, deterministic repeated output, required fields, cleanup_permission=none, enforcement_status=none, overall_health_posture validity, branch/artifact/policy posture fields, blocked_action_counts arithmetic, required_future_gates non-empty, evidence_sources completeness, read_only_note content, no mutation without -OutputPath, output artifact writing, -Force replacement behavior, bad OutputPath rejection, and artifact family registration. The full test-specbridge-cli.ps1 suite passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local validation evidence is tracked in the audit packet, including the full CLI regression suite and contract/scope validation. GitHub Actions CI, review gate, and security gate evidence will be recorded once the PR opens; merge remains gated on those checks passing per merge policy.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records changed files, validation status, policy result, risk result, merge status (not yet merged), deployment status, completion status (in_progress), and the remaining future enforcement risk.

findings.evidence: The repository health summary documentation states that cleanup_permission and enforcement_status remain 'none' regardless of detected branch or artifact debt, and that the command never deletes, prunes, renames, moves, archives, compresses, uploads, fetches, pulls, or force-pushes.
findings.recommendation: Keep cleanup and enforcement disabled unless a future dedicated policy and execution contract authorize branch cleanup or artifact retention enforcement.

unresolved_risks: Actual branch cleanup and artifact retention enforcement remain blocked until a future dedicated policy and execution contract authorize them.
